title: helichrysum pawekiae
intro: Helichrysum pawekiae, also known as the Elephant's Tooth, is a flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing due to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones and other compounds. The health benefits of Helichrysum pawekiae include its potential to alleviate pain, reduce inflammation, and improve skin conditions such as acne and eczema. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infused oils, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
